text.title: Multi-Machine Offline Cache Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) describing the spec artefact this methodology produces, plus valid + invalid + forbidden examples enforced by `scripts/validate-multi-machine-offline-cache.py`.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "multi-machine-offline-cache-2026q2-acme", "produces": "spec", "owner": "ruslan@faion.net", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "inputs_used": [ {"name": "trigger-context", "source": "tickets/INFRA-1234"}, {"name": "team-roster", "source": "wiki/team-roster"} ], "decision": "Run the procedure; promote to active after 7-day soak.", "rationale": "All Applies-If preconditions hold (owner named, storage available, prior cycle exists). No Skip-If predicate triggered.", "trace_refs": ["tickets/INFRA-1234", "wiki/team-roster"], "status": "active" }

example.note: artefact_id not kebab-case; produces wrong; owner == 'team' (rule r3); version not semver; date not ISO; inputs empty; decision empty; rationale < 40 chars; trace_refs empty (rule r5).

list.item: last_reviewed older than today - 90 days without a refresh flag (violates r4)
rationale that does not name any item in inputs_used (violates r5)
duplicate artefact_id within the same store (violates r1)
